review_reason: Phase 2 blocked: G-inference approach from research-003 has a gap. G(G(psi)) does NOT imply G(psi) in K4 logic (no T-axiom). Need alternative proof strategy for discreteImmediateSuccSeed_consistent.

artifacts.summary: Partial Phase 2 implementation with 1 sorry at line 319 in discreteImmediateSuccSeed_consistent

partial_progress.details: Phase 2 blocked at discreteImmediateSuccSeed_consistent Case 2. Research-003 G-inference approach fails because G(G(psi)) -> G(psi) is NOT valid in K4 logic (irreflexive semantics). Case 1 (L subset g_content) is complete. Case 2 (L contains blocking formulas) needs alternative strategy. Possible approaches: (1) Find different blocking formula that IS contained in arbitrary witnesses, (2) Use different proof technique for consistency, (3) Construct specific witness rather than showing containment in arbitrary witness.

errors.message: G-inference approach assumes G(G(psi)) -> G(psi) which is NOT valid in K4 (irreflexive temporal logic). Research-003 approach has a fundamental gap.
errors.recommendation: Need alternative proof strategy. Options: (1) Different blocking formula design, (2) Construct specific witness MCS, (3) Use different consistency argument that doesn't rely on partial G-lifting.
